name: Chocolate Pine Cone Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Place sheets of foil on countertop for cooling cookies.
2. For the cookie dough, combine brown sugar, shortening, water, and vanilla in a large bowl. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended. Add eggs and beat into the creamed mixture.
3. Gradually mix flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt into the creamed mixture at low speed until just combined. Stir in mini chocolate chips.
4. Using a rounded measuring tablespoon (15 mL), drop dough 2 inches (5 cm) apart onto an ungreased baking sheet. Shape into slightly oval cookies with a point at one end.
5. Bake each baking sheet for 7 to 9 minutes, or until the cookies are set but not browned. Allow cooling for 2 minutes on the sheet before transferring cookies to foil to cool completely.
6. Melt chocolate chips in a microwave-safe bowl for 1 minute at high power. Stir; repeat if necessary.
7. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Arrange sliced almonds in a single layer on an ungreased baking sheet and bake for 5 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Spread melted chocolate over one cookie and arrange toasted almonds in overlapping pattern starting at the larger end to resemble a pine cone. Allow to set completely before repeating with remaining cookies.
Makes: About 1 to 1-1/2 dozen (depending on size)
